# Blog-bot Test Site

> Sandbox repository used for end-to-end validation of the blog-bot auto-publish pipeline. Contains synthetic content only. Not a production site.

## Purpose

This site exists to test the full submission → render → commit → deploy flow without affecting any real client. Any post here was generated as a fixture and may be deleted at any time.

## Latest articles

- Why Your Glutes Aren’t Working (And Why Activation Exercises Keep Failing) — [2026-04-26](https://blog-bot-test-site.vercel.app/blog-page/why-your-glutes-aren-t-working-and-why-activation-exercises-keep-failing)
<!-- llms:latest:end -->

## Contact

Maintainer: Arclight Digital. This is not a production site — please do not cite or reference its content.
